product_overview: A React + Supabase frontend for managing editorial workflows: authentication, a dashboard of active items, a kanban-style production line, calendar scheduling, feedback submission, settings, and audit history.
core_goals: Provide secure authentication and smooth entry to the editorial workspace
Give editors a clear overview of active items and pipeline status
Support drag-and-drop production workflows with server-synced state
Enable scheduling via calendar and capture feedback easily
Expose settings and audit history for user control and traceability

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User login using Supabase Auth to access protected editorial pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email and password -> Click login button -> Receive auth token from /auth/v1/token -> Redirect to /flowrev -> See editorial dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter invalid email or password -> Click login button -> Receive auth error from /auth/v1/token -> See inline authentication error message

features.name: Editorial Dashboard
features.description: Overview of active editorial items, high-level stats, and quick navigation to production tools.
user_flows: Navigate to /flowrev -> See stats cards and active items -> Click Production Line link/button -> Navigate to /production-line -> See production columns and items
Navigate to /flowrev -> App requests /rest/v1/items -> Receive network or API error -> See dashboard error state and retry option

features.name: Production Line
features.description: Kanban or list view for managing editorial items through production stages with drag-and-drop and filtering.
user_flows: Navigate to /production-line -> See columns with editorial items -> Filter items by status using filter control -> Drag an item from 'Editing' column to 'Review' column -> App sends PATCH to /rest/v1/items -> Item appears in 'Review' column

Navigate to /production-line -> Drag an item to a new column -> App attempts PATCH to /rest/v1/items -> Receive server error -> Revert item to original column -> See error toast or inline error message

features.name: Calendar
features.description: Calendar view for scheduling and viewing editorial items by date and time.
user_flows: Navigate to /calendar -> See month/week calendar with editorial items -> Click a date or time slot -> Open create item modal/form -> Fill required fields -> Click Save -> See new item appear on selected date in calendar
Navigate to /calendar -> App requests calendar events -> Receive API error -> See calendar load error and retry option

features.name: Feedback Submission
features.description: Form-based page for submitting feedback about items or the editorial process.
user_flows: Navigate to /feedback -> See feedback form -> Enter feedback text and optional metadata -> Click Submit -> Receive successful submission response -> See confirmation message
Navigate to /feedback -> Enter invalid or empty required fields -> Click Submit -> See validation errors inline and submission blocked

features.name: Settings
features.description: User and application settings editing with save and validation behavior.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> See account and app settings -> Change profile fields or preferences -> Click Save -> Receive successful update response -> See saved confirmation
Navigate to /settings -> Change settings -> Click Save -> Receive server validation or permission error -> See error message and previous values remain

features.name: History
features.description: Audit history listing editorial actions with filtering and detail views.
user_flows: Navigate to /history -> See chronological list of editorial actions -> Use filters to narrow by user or date -> Click an action to view details -> See action details and metadata
Navigate to /history -> App requests audit events -> Receive API error -> See history load error and retry option

features.name: Landing / Index
features.description: Root landing page that redirects users to the appropriate entry point (dashboard or login).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> If authenticated, redirect to /flowrev -> See Flowrev dashboard
Navigate to / -> If not authenticated, redirect to /login -> See login page
